name: Invoice field extraction
summary: Extract structured fields from invoices over invoice:// URIs — NIP, number, dates, net/VAT/gross, seller, currency. Regex tuned for Polish faktura (also EN), text via pdftotext, optional LLM (OpenRouter) fallback. A folder route batches a month of invoices into a CSV with net/VAT/gross totals.
description: invoice:// turns invoice parsing into a first-class URI. invoice://host/file/query/parse returns structured fields {nip, number, issueDate, seller, net, vat, gross, currency} from one PDF/text — regex-first (text-layer PDFs via pdftotext), with an optional LLM pass (OpenRouter via litellm, use_llm=true) for layouts the regex misses. invoice://host/folder/query/audit parses every invoice under a folder into rows plus net/VAT/gross totals, optionally writing a CSV — for monthly accounting. invoice://host/receipt/query/draft is the bridge from camera://host/receipt/query/parse: it takes the receipt parser's JSON (or raw OCR text), reuses the invoice field extractor, derives net+VAT from the gross at a given vat_rate, and emits a KSeF-ready invoice draft. invoice://host/ksef/query/build turns that draft into a KSeF FA(2) XML (Naglowek/Podmiot1/Podmiot2/Fa with Adnotacje + addresses + FaWiersz) the ksef:// API connector can submit. invoice://host/ksef/query/validate validates that XML against the official FA(2) XSD (via lxml, set xsd_path/KSEF_FA2_XSD) or runs offline structural+arithmetic checks — gate real submission on valid=true. Read-only over the invoice files. Pairs with camera:// (scan a paragon), doc:// (OCR for scans) and fs:// (dedupe) in the office flow.

optional: litellm + OPENROUTER_API_KEY for the LLM fallback

useCases: Extract NIP, dates and net/VAT/gross from one invoice.
Audit a folder of invoices into rows plus monthly totals.
Turn a scanned receipt (paragon) into a KSeF-ready invoice draft (net/VAT/gross).
Build a KSeF FA(2) XML draft from a receipt/draft (paragon → e-invoice XML).
Validate a FA(2) XML against the official XSD (or structural+arithmetic offline).
Parse a KSeF UPO (confirmation) into the assigned KSeF number + timestamp.
Parse KSeF FA_VAT XML into exact fields and a per-rate VAT register (JPK).
Feed parsed rows into a spreadsheet for accounting.
